2605.01101.title: Virtual Speech Therapist: A Clinician-in-the-Loop AI Speech Therapy Agent for Personalized and Supervised Therapy
2605.01101.paper_summary: This paper develops Virtual Speech Therapist (VST), an intelligent agent-based platform that streamlines stuttering assessment and delivers customized therapy planning through automated and adaptive AI-driven workflows. VST integrates state-of-the-art deep learning-based stuttering classification, and multi-agent large language model (LLM) reasoning to support evidence-based clinical decision-making. The VST begins with the acquisition and feature extraction of patient speech samples, followed by robust classification of stuttering types. Building on these outputs, VST initiates an agentic reasoning process in which specialized LLM agents autonomously generate, critique, and iteratively refine individualized therapy plans. A dedicated critic agent evaluates all generated therapy plans to ensure clinical safety, methodological soundness, and alignment with peer-reviewed evidence and established professional guidelines. The resulting output is a comprehensive, patient-specific therapy draft intended for clinician review. Incorporating clinician feedback, the system then produces a finalized therapy plan suitable for patient delivery, thereby maintaining a clinician-in-the-loop paradigm. Experimental evaluation by expert speech therapists confirms that VST consistently generates high-quality, evidence-based therapy recommendations. These findings demonstrate the system's potential to augment clinical workflows, reduce clinician burden, and improve therapeutic outcomes for individuals with speech impairments. An interactive user interface for the proposed system is available online at: https://vocametrix.com/ai/stuttering-therapy-planning-agent , facilitating real-time stuttering assessment and personalized therapy planning.
2605.01101.paper_summary_zh: 這篇論文開發了虛擬語音治療師（VST），這是一個基於智能代理的平台，旨在簡化口吃評估並通過自動化和自適應的人工智能驅動工作流程提供定制的治療計劃。<lb/>VST整合了最先進的基於深度學習的口吃分類和多代理大型語言模型（LLM）推理，以支持基於證據的臨床決策。<lb/>VST首先進行患者語音樣本的獲取和特徵提取，然後進行口吃類型的穩健分類。<lb/>基於這些輸出，VST啟動一個代理推理過程，其中專門的LLM代理自主生成、評價並迭代完善個性化治療計劃。<lb/>一個專門的評價代理評估所有生成的治療計劃，以確保臨床安全、方法論的合理性，並與同行評審的證據和既定的專業指導方針保持一致。<lb/>最終輸出是一份全面的、針對患者的治療草案，供臨床醫生審查。<lb/>在整合臨床醫生的反饋後，系統隨後生成一份適合患者交付的最終治療計劃，從而保持臨床醫生在環路中的角色。<lb/>專家語言治療師的實驗評估確認VST持續生成高質量、基於證據的治療建議。<lb/>這些發現顯示該系統有潛力增強臨床工作流程，減輕臨床醫生的負擔，並改善語言障礙者的治療結果。<lb/>所提議系統的互動用戶界面可在線訪問：https://vocametrix.com/ai/stuttering-therapy-planning-agent ，以促進實時的口吃評估和個性化治療計劃。
2605.01101.author: Shakeel Sheikh et.al.
2605.01101.authors: Shakeel Sheikh, Patrick Marmaroli, MD Sahidullah, Slim Ouni, Fabrice Hirsch, Goncalo Leal, Bjorn W Schuller
